summary: R.5 ЧАСТ 2 Frontend Testing Complete - Cash секция + Project filter dropdown. All 15 test cases PASSED. Super_admin sees full cash section with 3 cards (paid/expected/overdue-none), project filter works, loading skeleton shows correctly. Sales role correctly sees non-finance-summary instead of cash section (no € amounts). AdminLayout named export working.

issues: 2FA notification toast overlaps with project filter dropdown in top-right corner - minor visual overlap, filter still functional

critical_code_review_comments: CashCards.jsx (165 lines): Correctly implements 3 cards with skeleton loading, overdue branching (cash-card-overdue vs cash-card-overdue-none), progress bar with width calculation
ProjectFilter.jsx (71 lines): Correctly fetches /api/projects, native select with 'Всички проекти' default, onChange returns null for all or project_id
AdminDashboard.jsx (125 lines): useEffect correctly depends on projectId, conditional rendering for is_finance_visible, non-finance-summary shows counts without € amounts
currency() helper in lib/api.js: Correctly uses Intl.NumberFormat with bg-BG locale and EUR currency
AdminLayout named export: Correctly exported and used in App.js routes
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing data: cash.paid=0, cash.expected=0, cash.overdue=0, sold_count=15, sold_value_with_vat=1235516.83
context_for_next_testing_agent: R.5 ЧАСТ 2 fully tested. Key test points: (1) Super_admin sees dashboard-cash-section with 3 cards (cash-card-paid, cash-card-expected, cash-card-overdue-none), (2) Progress bar exists with data-testid='cash-card-paid-progress' (width=0% when paid=0), (3) Project filter dropdown works with data-testid='dashboard-project-filter', (4) Sales role sees dashboard-non-finance-summary instead of cash section, (5) Both roles see dashboard-coming-soon placeholder, (6) Loading state shows 3 skeleton cards with data-testid='cash-card-skeleton'

verified_features.feature: Project dropdown [data-testid='dashboard-project-filter'] with 'Проект' label + 'Всички проекти' default
verified_features.details: Filter visible, label 'Проект' (uppercase via CSS), default value '__all__', options: ['Всички проекти', 'BEG Estates / Хаджи Димитър', 'Жилищна сграда Яна', 'Драгалевци_Estate']
All 3 cards visible with correct data-testid attributes
Paid card shows '0 €', Expected card shows '0 €', Overdue-none card shows '0 €'

verified_features.feature: Карта 'Закъснели': overdue=0 → cash-card-overdue-none (зелена с CheckCircle2 + '✓ Всичко наред')
verified_features.details: cash-card-overdue NOT visible, cash-card-overdue-none visible with '✓ Всичко наред'

verified_features.feature: Прогрес бар на 'Влязло в касата' card: width = min(100, paid/sold_value_with_vat × 100)%
verified_features.details: Progress bar element exists with data-testid='cash-card-paid-progress', style='width: 0%' (correct since paid=0)

verified_features.feature: Project filter промяна → API call → cash картите се преизчисляват
verified_features.details: Selected 'BEG Estates / Хаджи Димитър', API called, cards updated

verified_features.feature: Loading state: 3 skeleton карти с data-testid='cash-card-skeleton' (animate-pulse)
verified_features.details: During loading: 3 skeleton cards visible. After loading: 0 skeleton cards, real cards visible

verified_features.feature: Sales role → секция [data-testid='dashboard-cash-section'] НЕ се рендерира
verified_features.details: Cash section NOT visible for sales (is_finance_visible=false)
Non-finance summary visible with text: 'Продажби15 продадени имотаот общо 52 в проекта' - NO € amounts
Coming soon placeholder visible for both admin and sales roles

verified_features.feature: AdminLayout (named export) working - App.js routes use <AdminLayout>
verified_features.details: AdminLayout structure (lg:pl-64) present, sidebar visible, routes working
